## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Swoogo's SEO strategy, focusing on event registration and management content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event registration content showing positive growth: 424 clicks, \~2,000 daily impressions](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Form submissions from blog content increasing, but not specifically from event registration articles](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Discrepancy between Swoogo's priorities (event registration/management) and content focus (e.g., mobile app)](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Stacey expressed concerns about contract renewal and alignment of goals](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)

## Topics

### Q1 Priorities and Content Strategy

  - [Stacey emphasized focus on event registration and event management content](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Jimmy inquired about Q1 priorities to align content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing keyword rankings with form submissions as success metrics](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)

### Content Performance Update

  - [58 clicks, 13,000 impressions for event registration articles (Dec 31 - Jan 6)](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [10-15 new articles published last week](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [50k impressions for event registration articles (Aug 26 - Jan 6)](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Daily impressions increased to \~1,500 with growing clicks](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)

### Form Submissions and Lead Quality

  - [Increase in overall blog-driven form submissions](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [29 new contacts from blog views (lifecycle stage analysis needed)](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Suggestion to correlate blog views with demo requests](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### SEO Strategy Concerns

  - [Stacey questioned why event registration/management rankings haven't improved like event planning](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Discussion on competitors' influence on keyword difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Explanation of content authority vs. domain authority (currently at 37, competitors in 60s)](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)

### Content Missteps and Quality Control

  - [Article with competitor backlinks was taken down](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Prateek suggested using no-follow links and creating a blacklist of websites not to link to](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Recommendation to edit problematic content rather than removing entire articles](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Prateek demonstrated new category-based reporting for content performance](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Explained discrepancies between page-level and keyword-level data in Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stacey to discuss internally about contract renewal and alignment of goals](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Team to send a summary of the content strategy approach and metrics used](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Potential deep dive into the 29 new contacts from blog views](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Implement stricter quality control measures for outbound links in content](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Continue focus on event registration content while monitoring form submissions and lead quality](https://fathom.video/share/AdSDxC2LKpxR1u82ERT2yTuF7nVmHGBt?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
